task: Rebuild the decision logic for precharge pulse energy derating using only the embedded packet. Identify threshold crossings, perform sensitivity tests, and produce a review-ready decision packet (precharge_derating_calc.xlsx and design_review.md) with reproducible formulas/executable logic, intermediate calculations, row-level citations to the embedded packet, explicit assumptions, validation checks, sensitivity analysis, and a final decision table. Do not invent or use external inputs; mark unresolved ambiguities as needs_review. Trigger expert-review when any record's classification changes after a 5% sensitivity shift.
